skipInteraction.description: If true, the default event handlers are disabled. Those are used, for example, to display a tooltip or highlight the arc on hover.

arcLabel.nodeName: an individual pie arc label element

root.description: Styles applied to the root element.

series.nodeName: the g element that contains all pie arcs of a series

seriesLabels.nodeName: the g element that contains all pie arc labels of a series
